reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Handle snaps off the case VERY easily. Nice travel case and all but the handle strap snapped off before I was able to put anything in it. Review 2: rating 4.0. Just glad my son Don’t put what it is on the label when you’re shipping something. This is a Christmas gift. Just glad my son, who the gift is for, didn’t check the mail today. Seriously?! Review 3: rating 5.0. Five Stars It fit my pro controller Review 4: rating 4.0. Good for transporting full Switch setup Has dedicated spots for Switch, docking station, Pro controller/Grip, and HDMI cable. There’s no natural spot for the power cable and adapter so I squeezed it in on the side. There’s also no spot for games, so they end up bouncing around the case when you transport them.

While I could fit the whole setup in the case, it still has room for improvement by adding a dedicated slot for the power adapter and games. Review 5: rating 4.0. Plus I generally like Amazon Basics items I purchased this case as an alternative to the Nintendo branded case to save a few bucks. Plus I generally like Amazon Basics items. When I received the item in came in the normal Amazon Basics packaging, so nothing new there. Upon opening the case and checking it out I was quite pleased with my purchase. The case is large but not too bulky, the material is nice a study on the outside but soft on the inside, and its layout is decent. I do li... Review 6: rating 4.0. Amazing case, almost identical to the brand but... Dont get me wrong Amazon, you guys made a great case fits everything... except the Amazon basics Nintendo switch game case and if you guys come out with a 2.0 case could you beef up the zipper, it feels very weak and might break even if you have to charge like another $1-$2 I'd be fine with it, also if you make another game holder make it slim like holds 8 games slim but include two so it can fit in the travel case. Thanks guys and y... Review 7: rating 5.0. Solid, secure, and just the right size. Just big enough for what you need. Fits Switch, pro controller, HDMI cable, USB C charger, dock, and a couple extras. I especially like how snug everything fits, so I feel that they will be secure during travel. Check my photos for some detailed shots, but I was a little surprised by how low the bottom molding was, but it's still great. Review 8: rating 1.0. may have been returned. not the best quality. Mine had been opened previously. I felt like it was a return. Review 9: rating 5.0. I like the sturdiness and quality of the case Decent size storage case. I like the sturdiness and quality of the case. Amazon did a great job with protection and quality. Well padded and when it zips it creates a seal almost so it's very sleek. I would have liked to get the Nintendo Version but this one is more discrete.
It's not too heavy with everything in it. It takes some getting used to trying to put everything in a certain way, mainly the AC Adapter since it is clunky. But... Review 10: rating 1.0. Handle broke after a month Handle broke after a month Review 11: rating 2.0. Beware handle stiching not very strong, its only held by a few stiches, had to return The bag itself is ok, I had every intention of keeping until i picked it up and the handle came undone from the case to the handle, after closer inspection its held by a few threads. major fail by the design of this case. I had to return it. Review 12: rating 1.0. Misleading design leaves much to be desired... After trying this for a few short excursions, I have nothing but regret for this product. It is a well-built case, but whoever designed this either made "guesses" regarding the accessories, or was a complete idiot.

1) ZERO options to store ANY physical games securely, other than "one" in the console.

2) The "slot" where one is expected to store the Nintendo OEM power adapter is awkward. I w... Review 13: rating 2.0. Handle broken at the first day. The case is ok but handle broken at the first day. Review 14: rating 3.0. Good storage. Inside on the sides Good storage. Inside on the sides, has an elastic band to hold down your wires. I cut one side off to provide more storage for my other stuff. This fits all of the Switch accessories including a game carrying case. Very good quality. Soft on the inside, feels soft on the outside but has a hard shell.

Zipper gets stuck a lot for me. More often than not at all. Kind of annoying. Would have been 4-5 stars if it did not. Review 15: rating 5.0. Another reason to love Amazon! Perfect perfect perfect! Holds and protects the Switch with connected controller, and extra grip with two additional controllers or the pro controller, the dock, game cartridge case (not included) charging cable and hdmi cord easily and securely. I have used it to bring my switch all over the place and it is so amazing for the price! A must have for traveling switch owners who want a docked experience on the go! Review 16: rating 3.0. Good, but flawed Very sturdy and solid, my issue though is that there isn’t a very good place for the AC adapter or other cables to slot in because the elastic on the side storage areas just gets in the way. Everything fits, it just does so rather awkwardly. Review 17: rating 5.0. Very good quality! I’m confident it will keep all my gear safe Nice and sturdy carrying case for everything Switch related. I use it to hold my dock, pro controller, power cord, hdmi cord, joy con grips, game cartridges, and the Switch itself with both joy cons attached. Everything fits nicely except there’s only one spot for the joycon controller grip meaning you can either house that or the pro controller. Not a dealbreaker for me at all but just something to point out. It’s Big a... Review 18: rating 5.0. Overall, very satisfied 👌🏻👌🏻 The package came neatly and as expected. A box inside a box (because I ordered two other items with it).

My first reaction was how it smelled like new-product smell (which is good), so +1 star.
I tested to see if the zipper, the foam, and the rubber inside are in good condition, which they are (for now); another +1 star.
I placed my set inside to see if they fit; they do! The wires fit perfectly on either side as you can see on the pi... Review 19: rating 5.0. Definetly Reccomended A cheap price and it allows me to carry all the gear I need to set up on any TV screen. No real drawbacks except for size, but that's kind of unavoidable if you're trying to bring that much. Review 20: rating 1.0. Try not to hold it by the handle, because it WILL fall off. Had it for a week, and the handle ripped off despite my handling it relatively gently. I do not recommend it.
persona: This customer prioritizes product integrity and physical condition upon arrival, with little tolerance for defects, and expects items to be properly manufactured and packaged.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Defective I open d the box and one of the padded surfaces was folded up underneath itself.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. real thing I have gotten other brands which quit working after a couple of weeks, but this is the Nintendo brand and although it might cost more than the others it is more reliable and lasts longer . Review 2: rating 5.0. Works great with no issues and is super long so you ... Works great with no issues and is super long so you don't have to sit super close to the outlet Review 3: rating 5.0. Just like the one the 3ds originally came with. Lost my charger, so I bought this one. Found my charger while opening this package. Looks exactly the same as original charger- as it should. Good Quality. Will serve as a nice backup charger! Review 4: rating 5.0. Great, quality charger. The best. You want quality, buy the official Nintendo charger. Don't worry about amazon saying it's out of stock; if you have Prime, get it anyways. I've bought two so far and received them both within the week. Review 5: rating 5.0. and perfect with the new system True OEM adapter for the DS. In fact I had ordered this item for use with the New Nintendo 3DS XL and the box was actually the newest adapter!

shipped fast,and perfect with the new system. Review 6: rating 5.0. Genuine 3DS/DSi Charger Similar to many others, I was a bit annoyed when Nintendo announced that the New 3DS wouldn't come with an AC adapter so I had to search foir one.
Unlike many of the AC adapters on Amazon, this is a genuine Nintendo AC adapter. Being a genuine adapter, it's UL listed and is well built. Spend the extra few dollars on this over the other adapters on Amazon. You wont regret it. Review 7: rating 5.0. Works so far 07March2015 This product was delivered fast, nothing was broken and it fits the Nintendo 3ds perfectly. The cord is nice and long. Highly recommend. We have no problems so far, it is charging the 3ds just fine. Review 8: rating 5.0. Great Adapter! This adapter looks and functions just like the original one that comes with the console. Review 9: rating 5.0. Great Adapter! This adapter looks and functions just like the original one that comes with the console. Review 10: rating 4.0. Works good, Possibly Used/Refurbished New, Used, Refurb, unknown. Charger itself looks un-used, the box however looked like it has been opened before, the tape keeping it closed had 2 layers, one layer was previously cut. Works good so far, no signs of issues. Review 11: rating 1.0. Nintendo tricks you into spending more but what can you do? Why does Nintendo not sell the charger with the system? That's just a jerk move. No stars for you. Review 12: rating 5.0. It works. Its a charger. It charges. Review 13: rating 5.0. Perfect 10/10 was there supposed to be something wrong with ... Perfect 10/10 was there supposed to be something wrong with it? Other than Nintendo being complete buttfaces for pulling this stunt? "Oh yeah let's just not give people chargers for the new 3DS and then say that the warranty on it is void if you use any others and THEN we'll charge $30 for it! Money maakiiingg! Lets make sure to jipp off all the poor people who only spent a few years saving up for this product so tha... Review 14: rating 5.0. bought another one for backup cuz the N3ds line does't come with it original product and works with my N3ds XL and my old 3DS as well .

its F#@%ING stupid from Nintendo not including the charger in the 1st place in the New 3DS line . Review 15: rating 5.0. First-party Nintendo products are worth it! First off: always, ALWAYS, but a first party Nintendo charger for your 3DS. I got this for $8 on Amazon.

Anyway, I needed a new charger for my new New Nintnedo 3DS (not a fan of the name, haha) and decided to get this one. I thought this was a generic 3ds charger, but the box actually was updated to sport the colorful "new" on it. The connector is a little flimsier than the old charger, but this is a trusty and sturdy cha... Review 16: rating 4.0. It works as should It's a charger, and it works. I only give it 4 stars because Nintendo should have included it with their New 3ds XL systems and having to buy it separate kinda sucks. And don't argue that I shouldn't give this a lower rating because of the 3ds not including it because I don't care; this is the official Nintendo charger and Nintendo should have spent the extra $2 (cause you know this only costs that much to make) and included it with the system. Review 17: rating 1.0. NO thank you! This worked for about a month. I am now on the hunt for one that might actually work for the life of the console. This is the second one that we have had to throw away! WASTE OF MONEY! Review 18: rating 1.0. Not worth the money Broke within a week of getting Review 19: rating 3.0. Sad that this is not included with the 3DS Okay, can't blame Amazon for this rating. The item works as advertised and Amazon fulfilled the order in a timely manner. But come on Nintendo! You sell the 3DS without the charging cable? REALLY? Then the unsuspecting customer has to shell out more dough to get the cable. How lame. Shame on Nintendo for this. Review 20: rating 1.0. Didn't work. It simply did not work.
persona: This customer values practicality and organization in product packaging, prioritizing functionality and compatibility with their child’s Nintendo 3DS, including storage for accessories like chargers, and is likely to purchase items that offer clear utility and durability for family use.
reference_output: rating 3.0. Works, but should be packaged with the 3DS Nintendo!! Can you believe these cheap **** are not including a charger with the 3DS????

reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Eight dollars too expensive. In three words, how would I describe this product? Cheap, cheap, and cheap. For $8, you can do far better and get a full silicon grip for the whole controller. These things barely fit the controller and look to be clearly cracking the moment I put them on. Compared to other joystick grips and caps I've tried, these are by far the cheapest. Stay away. Review 2: rating 5.0. Great and Unique Design, Multiple Configurations! These are fantastic and the option of different configurations is great. They do not feel to be low quality like a previous reviewer mentioned and showed no signs of cracking or tearing while putting on. They don't slip off, don't even budge at all. This is a great design and a step up from much of the competition out there. I would definitely recommend these.

The joy-cons buttons are fairly close to the analogs, so I did... Review 3: rating 5.0. Excellent quality, and they never slip. These are the best. They never slip off or even move, and the color match is perfect for the red/blue joycons. I use the medium size grip on the left joycon and small grip on the right one. A++ Quality Review 4: rating 5.0. Only fits Joycons, but solid grips! It's nice getting a few sets, I wound up settling on the smallest of the three for now. The smooth tops are nice, compared to all the nubby ones for every other controller.

They are too small for a PS4/XBox/Wii U/Switch Pro controller, they only fit Joycons. Review 5: rating 5.0. Makes a Great Product Even Better I will start by saying that the thumbsticks on the joy-con are well-made even out of the box. That said, there isn't any reason to not make them even more functional. I've tried every pair of grips available, and these are by and far my favorite. The FPS Pro grip style is on my joycon to stay. They pave the way for superior accuracy, better grip, and a slightly wider thumb pad (which really helps when you have thick thumbs). I own these in every colo... Review 6: rating 5.0. Wish I had these from day 1 Ok. These things are amazing. I honestly would give an extra star if I could.

I bought two sets of these (to match a pair of blue neon and red neon joy-cons / his and hers switches) so I could use biggest grip evenly on Left and Right joy-con. These honestly have made me far more reluctant to use the pro controller. And they make handheld mode far more viable. Seriously, since buying these my pro controller is just collecting dust. This product ... Review 7: rating 1.0. doesn’t seem like they are even for a switch Doesn’t fit the joystick snug, doesn’t seem like they are even for a switch joycon Review 8: rating 4.0. Wanted to give em 5 Stars but the color is off badly. God I really wanted to give these 5 stars but for the price $9 for 6 I was just wanting them to be perfect. First off they fit and feel great on the Switch. I also am fimilar with the brand because I have a case for my Switch and Thumb Grips I’ve purchased before for my PS4 and Xbox One. So far I’ve loved all their products - except these. Like I said the fit and feel are great the problem is the color. After a few days I can real... Review 9: rating 1.0. Not what I thought Not what I thought it would be. We lost the original rubber nub cobers and I thought these would replace those but these go OVER originals. Review 10: rating 2.0. Very Meh. Regretting purchase. Bought them thinking they’d be a nice addition to my switch for first person shooters, it’s actually feeling worse. They don’t look very good either. Review 11: rating 2.0. 1 per color and size Disliked that it only has 1 of each different color of each size instead of 2 for each color for each size Review 12: rating 5.0. Covered up my shame One of my joy cons was pulling to one side, so I popped the cover off, and cleaned it out. This stopped the pull, but started a new problem. The thumbstick has a bunch of knobblies that need to be lined up properly in order for the rubber to lie flush against the thumbstick. I couldn’t get it to line up to save my life, so it looked like my poor thumbstick had hemorrhoids. So I bought these nifty caps. Really simple to install right over the old ones, took about 3... NUNCA VA A LLEGAR No lo compren yo gaste mi dinero aqui y nunca llego y luego para la devolucion fue todo un problema si pudiera darle 0 estrellas se las daria no lo olviden no lo compren!!!!! Review 14: rating 1.0. Not a replacement of the original Be advised this is to cover the original thumb pad, not to replace it. Review 15: rating 2.0. Eh It's cheap material. Not what I expected it to be. Review 16: rating 5.0. Look and feel great! These feel and look great! I got the neon red and blue to match my joy cons. The color is ever so slightly different since they are rubber vs. plastic, but it’s hardly noticeable and they look really nice. They are also easy to put on if you follow the in package instructions, which says to flip the lip up first. I then aligned them with the joystick and flipped one side down then the other. It only took a try or two on each one. I am using the skin grip since I ... Review 17: rating 2.0. I like the idea but.. They always pop off!! I don't really want to superglue them on so I might just return them. Review 18: rating 1.0. Does not work on pro controller. Complete lies as these do not fit the pro controller like the description says. Review 19: rating 5.0. Joycon Game changer! Extremely pleased. Fit was great and the color is a perfect OEM joycon match. A must buy!
persona: This customer prioritizes product functionality, durability, and value for money, often seeking affordable alternatives to branded items while still expecting reliable performance and compatibility across devices; they appreciate multi-packs, ease of installation, and clear product descriptions that match real-world use cases.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Not good for long play. grips are firm compared to original The biggest reason i purchased this item was because my kids ripped out the top cover for the original analog sticks, exposing the bare plastic of the analog sticks. If you are solely purchasing this for the same reason i did, please keep in mind that the item does not stay put. I had to put a thin double tape underneath to keep it put. Other than that, it does the job. The grip cover does not feel like the original and are a little bit more firm, making it a little difficult and hard to use for long play.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Awful Cool mouse. Connection freezes for 5seconds once every 10 min. Bad for gaming. Couldn’t reach customer support for over a week. Went back to Logitech. Review 2: rating 4.0. Not tacky, works with Mac This is a nice mouse, I'm happy with the purchase. The wheel feels fantastic and the shape is great. I would prefer a little more weight and I find it feels a bit cheap in some ways. Specifically the buttons have a somewhat cheap click feel to them and the housing that holds the battery isn't really attached with anything, just comes off. I don't think this will cause a problem, it just feels a bit cheaply made.

This works on my Mac (High Sierra) ... Review 3: rating 1.0. 5th mouse broke. I never give things 1 star for malfunctioning because I just replace it and it usually works fine. We live on earth, not everything will work perfectly. I have heard of Razer products being bad, But I have replaced this 5 times. 1-2 months in on EVERY mouse, either the left click stopped working (on 2 different mice) the middle click stuck, the middle click just stopped working entirely. Its always something different, and always juuuust after the 30 day period where... Review 4: rating 1.0. Delivered DOA Delivered DOA - couldn’t write a review even if I tried. Major let down to buy some thing and wait to get it only for it not to be able to function at all. Got my money back and bought a different mouse Review 5: rating 1.0. Poor Durability The USB receiver broke only after a month of usage. Bad quality. And I will never buy Razor products again. Review 6: rating 2.0. Nice mouse but faulty Within one week, the friction pads on the bottom started to come up at the corners. Within a few more weeks, the right mouse button started to flake when holding it down.
The mouse is comfortable, has no noticeable latency, and is otherwise a nice mouse. It is unfortunate that it stopped working so early in its lifespan. Review 7: rating 2.0. Ok mouse for price Razer mouse works as expected, no complains here. (I just use it for daily stuff, not for gaming)
Package came with heavy pierced trough damage and slight mark on mouse itself.
As it was shot with BB gun.
Shipping package has no such damage, meaning seller was aware of damage and not having a curtsy to ask if I'm OK with it.
Bad, bad seller.
I was disappointed with Razer in past.
This will probably my last Razer product I ever buy Review 8: rating 5.0. i am a noob I like this mouse - responsive, comfortable, easy to reach buttons..... I am a noob therefore difficult to really assess... but..... I like it. I was able to program the keys the way I wished in spite of being rather..... computer challenged. :) This is the first time I have spent more than $25 on a mouse and I think it's worth it. Review 9: rating 1.0. Poor wireless connection Mouse disconnected from wireless constantly. Returned it for a refund. Review 10: rating 1.0. Don't buy Pauses and skips around a ton. Used it for a total of 10 minutes and out of that 10, it was unresponsive for a third of it. Review 11: rating 1.0. Constantly disconnects for no reason Has been a pain in the butt while gaming due to the continuous connectivity loss. Potentially a defective item or that it's just a poor product. Will be returning. Review 12: rating 5.0. My New Favorite Mouse I've been using this mouse for several months now and am entirely content with my purchase.

Pros:
Wireless - supports both 2.4GHz via wireless adapter, as well as bluetooth for use with mobile devices.
Comfort - fits wonderfully in my hand, feels very similar to the Logitech G602 and Steel Series Rival 600.
Battery Life - unbelievable, I've switched batteries a total of only 3 or 4 times in the last 8 months.
Grip - the texture of ... Review 13: rating 2.0. Left button not registering prolonged clicks. I'm sure it has to do with wear, however, this has happened rather quickly. The mouse registers as if I've let go of the left mouse button even though I am holding it down (no click sound indicating that it is no longer depressed). This becomes problematic when dragging emails, files, basically anything. Trying to select specific text on a web page for example, becomes quite the chore.

Worked great for about 60 days, now it's j... Review 14: rating 1.0. Sent an email on June 8th and so far Nothing! I sent an email on June 8th, no one even bothered to answer yet, my mouse is Not working properly, Battery wont last 2 or 3 days Max, sometimes do crazy things on it own Review 15: rating 1.0. disconnects all the time I'll be using the mouse and then all of a sudden it stops working randomly almost everyday. I will not buy a mouse from this company again. I don't recommend this at all. Review 16: rating 1.0. Breaks after a month of use After one month of using for MineCraft and COD the right mouse button no longer works. The trigger inside is broken because it's so cheaply made. Do not buy. Review 17: rating 1.0. Frick This mouse is small pp do not buy. Bad. Review 18: rating 1.0. Expensive for what it gives back I found this mouse to be expensive. I was expecting a better feel, but it is way too lightweight. The wheel is not the best. The wheel was way better on the previous version of the Basilisk. For those who say you need the software to adjust the DPI, they haven't play with the mouse enough. The button on the top adjusts the DPI without software. Also, this mouse is not as nearly as precise as the previous version. I got it because my previous Ba... Review 19: rating 2.0. It Is NOT REchargeable Razer Basilisk X Hyperspeed Wireless mouse is NOT rechargeable. This mouse comes with one replaceable battery and it is not a rechargeable battery. It is a basic model. So NO Optical Switches. You do not really sense the "HyperSpeed" feature it is named after.
When compared to Logitech G502 Proteus Spectrum, Razer Basilisk X HyperSpeed is clearly smaller and lighter than G502. Review 20: rating 1.0. Might Be Great - Lousy Support Arrived an out of box failure. Contacted support, they had me fill out a gazillion questions and then they never got back to me.

If it worked as advertised, it might be a great product.
persona: This customer prioritizes affordability and functional performance, often seeking budget-friendly alternatives to premium products, and values practicality and reliability over brand prestige, particularly when the product meets basic usability needs.
reference_output:
rating 1.0. G502 clone, no infinite scroll wheel, feels cheap Bought the mouse used thru warehouse deals listed as very good condition. The mouse arrived in great shape. The issue I had was the battery will show full then empty. I swapped numerous batteries and it kept doing it.
The mouse itself is a copy of the Logitech g502 wireless and it’s not built to the same standards. Sure the mouse is almost identical in size but the build quality is no where close to logitech.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Useless Mine won't plug in to my NES control deck either. The connector at the end of the cord (that is supposed to plug into the console) is too big. Unfortunately, this is a major problem that renders the product useless. Too bad--it LOOKS nice, and the buttons feel sturdy, etc. Maybe I'll hang it on my wall for a decoration.
From now on, I'll GLADLY pay a few extra dollars for a refurbished original name-brand product, rather that try to save money with one of these cheap... Review 2: rating 4.0. Good Controller, one thing though. It works great, and it's a good price, however there is a nick in the cord, which was not listed on the description. Review 3: rating 4.0. NES Controller I love playing the NES but had no idea where my controllers ended up after the move, so I ordered new ones. I like these, only problem is that you can't pull on them too hard or else they will come out. Review 4: rating 5.0. This controller DOES work. I bought this controller on a gamble and I'm VERY glad I did. It works perfectly and feels just like an NES controller. I've been using it on a Famiclone (a RetroN 3 console, to be exact) and I've experienced no problems whatsoever with it. In fact I was able to get pretty far on games like Kung Fu and Ninja Gaiden, so I rest my case. If people have bought defective controllers, they should take it up with the seller directly rather than claiming all contro... Review 5: rating 3.0. Good shipping While the controller is not the best of quality, the merchant did a good job of promptly notifying me of a returned shipment "unable to deliver" and then re-shipping it to another address. Review 6: rating 2.0. Cheaply Made It gets the job done, however it's very cheaply made and broke fast. Clap. Clap.

Get an official controller. Stay away from this garbage. Review 7: rating 3.0. Chinese knockoff nes controller Recently bought this controller for my Retron 3, and have to say it sucks. The one I got was a Chinese knockoff with extremely delayed reaction time and you have to pound the buttons to make them work. If you can avoid the knockoffs and get an original nes controller, licensed by nintendo if possible. Review 8: rating 3.0. Cheap build but still works okay The looks are deceiving. When I bought this controller, it was a bundle deal with a Genesis controller and the Retron 3 console. This controller looked liked the real Nintendo controller and I thought it was. But it wasn't. It is a cheap imitation. The construction is cheap and the buttons feel a bit mushy compared to the original Nintendo controller. But it still works. You can still manage to play the games with it. So I am giving this an very l... Review 9: rating 5.0. NES, What more can you say? The nes controller is one thing you cant be without if you are a true gamer. I really enjoyed holding this in my hand again after so many years have past since I last played. All the buttons worked for the games that I have for it. Theres nothing that would stop me from buying this again if I needed too. Review 10: rating 3.0. Some slight issues, but solid. The item itself looks the part, but it does feel very cheap, very plasticy. The problem that I have is hitting both B and A at the same time seems to be really hit-or-miss. It's a real issue when playing games like TMNT III: The Manhattan Project. Also, the d-pad is a bit finicky. It seems to move left or right when you are holding down on the d-pad, which can make issues in some games where you need to crouch.

It looks like a standard NE... Review 11: rating 1.0. These controls suck! I didn't pay close enough attention when I bought these. These are not official NES controllers so beware. They are cheap pieces of junk. Stay away! Review 12: rating 3.0. It's ok My controller works, sort of. You can play games with it, BUT the D-pad is the problem here. It doesn't always register your presses. I've found that pressing lightly and near the center of the D-pad gets me accurate feedback most of the time, but doing this makes it hard because 1. It's not natural and your play will suffer, and 2. It isn't reliable 100% of the time. So, you will have your Mario occasionally falling down very stupid gaps unintentionally. But for the price th... Review 13: rating 1.0. you get what you pay for! i'm sorry, but i guess it's just the luck of the draw this time! my 13 year old grandson and i decided to play games, and i cracked out the new 'controller' from it's packaging, plugged it in, and found the the forward-motion button does not work, or hangs...problem: it costs so little money that sending it back hardly seems worth all the effort at this time of the year...so--even though this product is 'new'...it is defective. Review 14: rating 1.0. This controller SUCKS!!!!! Returning it STAT. It is not fluid in movement and several times I have gotten lost in layers of the game. persona: This customer prioritizes long-term durability and reliable performance over price, and is likely to avoid products with known mechanical flaws or poor build quality, preferring items that function consistently without frequent failure.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Save your money and buy something that actually works and doesn't break like a cheap toy you bought at a swap meet ... I have had 2 of these break in the period of a single year. One has had the handle grips peel off on both sides and has thumb stick drift on the left thumb stick. Thumb stick drift is when the thumb sticks internal circuit acts as as if you are moving it in the upward direction perpetually even though you aren't moving it in that direction or moving it at all. The second controller of these I have had break as both thumbsticks have the drift effect on them rendering the controller unusable. Save your money and buy something that actually works and doesn't break like a cheap toy you bought at a swap meet while you are using it exactly as intended.

reference_output:
rating 1.0. Shameless. Thanks, Coalition... DO NOT BUY THIS EDITION. So yeah, the cover shooting is fine/fun, but this is one shameless cash-grab... With somehow WORSE graphics than Ultimate.

Be wary, some spoilers below so read on at your own discretion.

The campaign is a pretty big disappoint to say the least. Yes, the combat is solid (as Gears has always been) and it thankfully went back to the old control scheme instead of Judgment's butchery of it. However, while the action is once again entertaining, plot-wise, it's a travesty of storytelling with large amounts of holes, questions that the developers don't even bother answering (let alone attempting to give hints on) and imperative plot points for understanding the new Sera, new characters and The Swarm that are completely swept under the rug. Of course, the reasoning behind this is that The Coalition doesn't want to tell a great narrative now; they want to franchise it for as long as possible and come up with resolutions as they're allowed to make sequels. Guys, a constant slew of unaddressed questions is not a story and a cliffhanger is not an ending (it should only be part of). And speaking of the "ending"; it's terrible. It feels like the game is just getting started (especially when you consider where the finale takes place) and then, after a 2-3 minute cutscene, it cuts to black with next to nothing having been accomplished and learned. There's not even a main villain or anything (the guy it sets up to be a primary foe is dispatched earlier on and doesn't even have a name in the game) What's even more shameless is that, to get information on the narrative (beyond, you know, the damn game), you have to go online to something like Wiki as the game doesn't even do its job of informing you. For anything more, you have to wait another decade (for two more games plus DLC) to just understand base information that they should have been telling you now like:

-Why does JD hate Marcus and why did he seemingly abandon him? (of course, we could infer, but tell us what happened!)
-Why does JD hate Baird?
-What happened to Anya and how did she die?
-What is Jinn's motive and why does she just disappear during the last act?
-Why do JD and the outsiders hate Jinn and their seemingly peaceful society, but still want to loot and attack their settlements?
-Why in the world would Reyna's mom lock she, JD and Del in a shed when The Swarm attack AFTER she just had you save the ENTIRE village from a DeeBee attack? These are your best proven fighters! (Okay, so that was just really bad writing/a plot hole, but still).
-How can the Swarm hack robots with quills? And if they can, why aren't they hacking the DeeBees later in the game instead of fighting them? Seems like a waste of a randomly-generated enemy trait.

These are just a minimal amount of major plot threads that are just shrugged off in favor of further franchising, like Halo 5. And no, to everyone gibbering away that they're just setting up for the DLC and sequel and yadd-yadda-yadda----NO. This is flat-out bad writing and bad storytelling. Give us something!

The Swarm are also kinda just dumb. They don't look interesting, hardly have any diversity and the "Scions" just look nonthreatening with their too-dimwitted/human faces. There's potential for them, but the game gives no depth to them or their purpose other than harvesting.

The characters are also grating. JD is alright, but the "humorous" dialogue is near non-stop and most of it is the trio not taking anything seriously, making jokes and speaking solely in sarcasm. Yes, the original games had this, but in this one, it's so incessant and so cringe-worthy that it's just obnoxious. There's simply a time and place for everything and this one has these infants copping jokes around a mutilated body they just discovered. That and they act like brats and treat Marcus and Baird like crap. Reyna even has the audacity to speak down to Marcus at one scene where all he's trying to do is talk sense.

Multiplayer is alright but it doesn't 'feel' like Gears of War combat. It feels like a Call of Duty interpretation. Again, it does Gears' gameplay, but in a Call of Duty-esque way. Now, everything's about loadouts, temporary cards you can equip and "zombie" characters (like COD) that look pretty stupid. I really liked unlocking the character models in old Gears games and the ones in this are just lazy (color-splattered? Seriously? Gimme a Theron, please). Worse, multiplayer is utterly mutilated with micro-transactions. There are seriously 3 forms of currency and getting credits isn't a grind, it's an absolute slog. Worse, when you actually get enough credits to buy one of the packs, it's completely random whether or not you'll receive anything worthwhile. 99% of the time, you receive the lamest gun skins or experience cards--and even doubles at that in the SAME PACK! Even worse (yup, it does get worse) I now have doubles (and even one TRIPLE) of cards that the game won't let me "scrap" for currency to buy another skin instead. Now, I have decks of cards that are literally unusable. It's revolting, it's disgusting and it's even gambling. They literally force you to gamble on stupid slots. Funny, considering all those gamers who got busted on COD for gambling because they were actually EARNING money by playing--and the ol' government came down on them for. BUT NO, it's totally okay for AAA game companies to extort and pocket money if they're the ones forcing gamers to gamble. Insane. Also, the season pass was utterly worthless as it doesn't come with ANYTHING that would/should come in a season pass. Oh, the new characters/Run the Jewels box or the MLG loot box??? NOPE! Gotta pay extra even though you already shelled out $100 (not that I care for the character models, but still, it's principle). Of the loot I got with the $100 edition, I got nothing worthwhile but several "pine" skins for guns that look as stupid as they sound. So what do you get with this edition? Kinda-sorta early access (one week before they're released for free) to multiplayer maps that can only be played on the developer mode.

As for guns, the DeeBee weapons are actually the most fun (the Overkill and Embar). However, most of the time, I just used the original lineup of guns as I feel they're more effective. The Dropshot is annoying as it sometimes works really well and sometimes explodes directly next to someone and does... Nothing. The Buzzkill is stupid fun, but like the Dropshot I never bothered to use it beyond its introductory use (as it's slow to start firing and needs to be used from a static position). The Markza is okay, but when you already have a sniper and lancer/hammerburst, it's kinda void.

Music is also severely lacking when it should be used during cutscenes. One "emotional" moment is rendered "meh" by the complete lack of a sympathetic song (think The Coalition trying to replicate the Maria scene from Gears 2 but without memorable music and/or emotional investment from the player--as again--it's taken no time to explain why we should care about these new characters).

As a fanatic of all things Gears (except that crap one Judgment), I find Gears 4 to be decent mindless fun, but a slap in the face as well for those who have supported the series. It's clear the people involved (and still are from previous games) needed Cliffy B. to guide them and really don't understand their fan base nor what makes a game great. It's a AAA title all the way in that it's a microtransaction-filled cash-grab made for the general public first and fans secondly.

reference_output:
rating 3.0. Decent Action RPG, Pretty Terrible Final Fantasy I have been a long-time Final Fantasy fan, so my review is probably biased in that regard. I tend to hold these titles to a higher standard, so when they are not particularly great, like this one, I will be more disappointed than most.

After playing through this title, I found it to be fairly superficial at its heart. The combat was not incredible engaging, the characters progression fell relatively flat, and the bosses were fairly uninspiring. The dialogue is extremely cringe worthy, and I found myself disliking half of the characters as they seem more like a caricature than a person. The story was okay, but it was so severely hampered by the dialogue, that it broke any kind of immersion I might have felt.

In general, this is a fairly average action RPG. I think it is worth playing through if you have extra time/money on your hands, but like the other FF games in its universe (I am looking at you FFXIII), it is not a great entry to the series.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 1.0. Don't waste your money! First one broke after 3 weeks so I emailed the company. They sent me a replacement and then the 2nd one broke 2 weeks later as well. Terrible! Review 2: rating 1.0. Analog drift Used it for a few sessions until I noticed the analog drifting. After a while it got really bad and I can no longer use it. I still have the two of the original Gamecube controllers that still work and this goes to show that the quality isn't really the same as it used to be. Granted this is third party but seeing how joycon drift is also a thing, can't say I'm happy. Review 3: rating 1.0. Defected/broken item? My controller doesn't seem to work. After I plug it into the USB port, and turn on the switch, it says it's supposed to work. But mine doesn't. I followed every instruction and every step but the controller doesn't seem to work. I think I got a defected controller and got the short end of the stick on bad luck. Review 4: rating 1.0. Messed up controller Came to me defective, the cursor constantly moves downwards without my input. Review 5: rating 1.0. Absolute garbage It worked for the first 2 days and then the B button started acting as if it was being pressed the whole time. Few days past and then the A button and minutes later both the X and Y we’re doing their own thing. Idk what is wrong with these things but I DO NOT recommend these things to others looking for these types of controllers. Get the PowerA purple colored ones. Those work PERFECTLY. Review 6: rating 2.0. DO NOT USE FOR COMPETITIVE PLAN I play Smash Ultimate competitively which means that I put in a lot of hours on this game, and consequently the controller. These things are very cheap so they break down very quickly. I would only use this if you're playing the game casually and don't spend 20hrs a week playing on it. Review 7: rating 1.0. Left trigger jammed within 1 month Useless after less than 1 month. Review 8: rating 3.0. Right analog drift Literally just purchased on 12/5/2019 and it's 1/6/2020. Less than a month of playing an already started drifting. Mind you that I only played Resident Evil 4, 5 and 6. That's just completing one run of each campaign on each game. Sucks that it started drifting so early. I had purchased a different PowerA controller and had the same exact problem within months also. The good thing is each controller has a 2 year warranty and will send you a new one. That's the only... Review 9: rating 1.0. Controller stopped working unexpectedly My son used this controller for 5 weeks and it suddenly stopped working. He is 14 and paid for it with his own money. Needless to say, he is very disappointed. Review 10: rating 3.0. Make sure to check you control stick calibration [[VIDEOID:39b9eff7a07f990a22792eafe3d4c50b]] The one works great very pleased with it the second one however has a slight drift problem with the left stick not too major but it’s definitely there and kinda upsetting. Wouldav got 5 stars easily for the price and usability if I was only rating the first one lol Review 11: rating 1.0. Hope you like drifting joysticks. [[VIDEOID:49fe592466d98ee452b9fd498e3c00d1]] Tried it right out of the box from the mail. The joystick for the controller keeps drifting upwards to the top of the screen without any input. I've tried recalibrating, replugging the controller, and turning off the switch entirely.

Please don't sell broken items to customers, and do some quality control first. It's tacky, unprofessional, and an embarassment. Review 12: rating 1.0. The back button stuck after 1 hour of use on 2 controlerd Bought 2 controllers and very excited to use. However the back button keep sticking after 1 hour of use for both controllers. What are the chance both controllers has the same issues? Very disappointed and would not recommend. Review 13: rating 5.0. Feels exactly like the original This controller feels exactly like the original gamecube controller, which is to say they didn't see the need to update the ergonomics of it at all. I think we can all agree that the gamecube controller button layout is fantastic, but the ergonomics of the thing aren't anywhere near as good as modern controllers. Like why are the handles completely parallel rather than coming in at an angle? Why aren't they a little thicker? Why does the c stick not ha... Review 14: rating 2.0. Control Stick Drift. :( At first I loved these controllers, but ended up having one with a drifting control stick. This is a controller that can't be calibrated.

So, I favored the other one, but now both of them drift. One goes straight West, and the other drifts Northwest. Disappointed. Review 15: rating 1.0. feels cheap its feels really cheap and light Review 16: rating 2.0. Died very early. Died after 2 months. was good before it just stopped working. Review 17: rating 1.0. DO NOT PURCHASE STOPS WORKING AFTER A FEW MONTHS A friend and I both purchased this controller and it stopped working after a few months, there was no return or replacement issues. Scammed. Review 18: rating 1.0. Believe the rest of the reviews about the toggle Lasted a week before the toggle went wild with no way of recalibrating, basically just bought a 10ft micro usb chord Review 19: rating 1.0. Do not buy controller I had bought two controllers and used them for about a month or two and they both started making inputs by themselves. Tried to interchange they cords and they both still didnt work. Do not buy these terrible controllers. Review 20: rating 1.0. Does not work with Dolphin Do not buy this if you are getting it to interface with Dolphin GC emulator. It's cable terminates as a USB-A plug and dolphin does not recognize it.
persona: This customer prioritizes enjoyable, engaging gameplay and content depth, willing to overlook minor technical issues if the overall experience is fun and immersive, and values games that offer lasting entertainment and replayability.
reference_output: rating 1.0. not working right it works, but it has some kind of  delay, really annoying!!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. BEST PS GAME EVER!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! That is what comic book guy would be saying about Metal Gear Solid if he played it.
Solid Snake an operative of the governments secert unit FOXHOUND is called out of retimerment to deal with a new threat. Terrioist have sized Shaddow Mosses Island, site of a nuclear weapons disposal site. Worse still the terrioits are members of FOXHOUND, Snake's former unit. This team of elite and deadly soldiers now threatens the world with a nuc... Review 2: rating 5.0. One of the greatsest video games ever made!! This game is a total classic in every way. The plot, the gameplay, the characters...everything! Review 3: rating 1.0. was this meant to be a satire of video games? I rue the day this title came out for Playstation. It was considered so original, it influenced many, many stealth-type games that followed it. Too many.

Where do I start with the things I hate about this game?

1. It's way too difficult. You get awfully sick of hearing "Snaaaaaaaaaaaaaake!" every 10 seconds. There should have been a way to ratchet down the difficulty even further for 'tards like me. "Easy" mode reall... Review 4: rating 5.0. a classic This game is great. I sat down and finished it in two sitting. But I will play it again for sure soon. The story is awesome and will keep you guessing till the end. There is no camera controls but It is not a big deal as the camera will show you everything you need to see. This game is epic and if you have the ability to play it you should. Review 5: rating 5.0. Tactical Espionage Awesomeness! I first played the demo of this game when I was 15.It'd come on one of those Playstation Underground demo dics.I fell in love with this game then borrowed it from a friend over the summer and beat it!Now,as then,I can't put this thing down!My best friend and I quote it all the time and try to sneak around in random places.Highly recommend.Props to the seller! Review 6: rating 5.0. Metal Gear Solid My absolute favorite! Finally got it replaced. Very unique gameplay. Nothing can compare. The original, started the entire genre. Great plot, good graphics for the time, and excellent character development. Laid the foundation for one of the best selling game franchises in history. Review 7: rating 5.0. Snake Actually, I haven't played the cd because PS1 games have regional restrictions. But the cds are in great shape. I'm looking forward to buying a vintage PS1 game console to Amazon soon so I can play the games I bought and shipped here to Philippines. The game, I am certain that it is great. I've finished it so many times and I never grew old playing it. Review 8: rating 5.0. Masterpiece I had this game way back when it originally debuted, tho never got to finish the game. Had to get this to actually complete the Metal gear Solid HD collection, which tragically does not contain this part. I don't understand why, as I still remember the characters, story, and music as if it were yesterday. It may have a learning curve, but once learned turns into an experience not to be missed. Review 9: rating 5.0. Perfect This is one of the most near-perfect games I have ever played. The story is like a movie, the boss fights do not suck, the way you progress through the campaign is kind of like zelda and metroid which is cool. Get this if you love action games, movies, or just games in general. Review 10: rating 5.0. Timeless classic There has yet to be a game to rival the feel of this MGS game, characters plot, environment, even the gameplay, has a good taste that just wreaks of quality. Even with today's bustling graphics and gameplay realism etc.....this is still a must play game! Review 11: rating 5.0. A Metal Gear Solid game from PSX. A masterpiece from Hideo Kojima. The story, and each of the bosses are ones of the best in video game's history. Gameplay is a mix of stealth and action. Probably won't have a wow factor like it used to 15 years ago, but this is a game that shaped video game industry! Get it! You will love it. Review 12: rating 5.0. One of the best PS1 games ever. Espionage. Stealth. Run and gun. This game does just about everything. The sniper boss even kind of plays out as a side scroller. This was one of the first games I played that really took on the whole "game through a movie" style. By the end of the game, I felt that the "save the environment" message was coming on a bit strong but to tell you the truth, that's really the worst part of the whole game. The creativity of some of the bosses... Review 13: rating 1.0. Metal Gear Solid Im writing this review about amazon.com on this game I purchased because either Amazon.com or the Seller has issues. What is pictured is the BLACK labeled for sale and under sellers or Amazon.com have no idea about these things maybe. They also have the greatest hit. So this pretty much is lieing to US the consumer about the product we are trying or about to purchase. Everyone just watch out because if you want the BLACK label game and you may receive the GREATEST HI... Review 14: rating 1.0. Bad supplier This rating is not for the videogame. I am a huge fan a MGS been so for years. What this rating is for is the supplier, Goodwill Industries of Columbia, which failed to ship my purchased product after an entire month. Waited a little longer than acceptable as I value patience as a virtue but this supplier is truly horrendous they didn't even send me any notice of any kind so I ultimately had to file a claim. Excellent videogame though have played it in the past and would... Review 15: rating 5.0. PS Game Metal Gear Solid is one of the best games I have ever played. This is a game you can play another 20 years from now and still have fun playing it. Review 16: rating 5.0. Still The Best I'm writing this review from the future.

Well, not really, but this is one of several classic games that, in 2014, is still worth buying and playing. While it is supposedly playable on most PS2s and some PS3s, do yourself a favor and pick up a good used PS1 from a reputable seller. The whole bundle of stuff will cost you less than most new games. Review 17: rating 5.0. Metal Gear Solid! Just got this game today and the nostalgia kicks in :) I have seen my bro play it so many times and when he didn't have it anymore, I had to buy this game and play it for myself :) I want to try and play every single game in the series :) Review 18: rating 5.0. The game works perfect, but I do have to warn that the ... Game came shipped with original case, manual, and two discs. The game works perfect, but I do have to warn that the first boss of the game occurs very early and can be a bit difficult to new players. This game is one of the best games in terms of storyline and is a must-get for any player looking for a storyline with heavy depth to it. Review 19: rating 5.0. Truly Cinematic: A Playable Movie! Don't judge this game just because it is an old PlayStation game with bad graphics. The graphics don't even compromise this masterpiece! The writing is amazing! Expect superb voice acting, even for an old 1998 game. Some of the gameplay mechanics are a bit outdated, such as you can't go in first person view mode when shooting a weapon. But everything else is awesome!!!!! This game has such a cinematic feel to it, and it's basically a playable movie!... Review 20: rating 4.0. Was pretty short in today's standards but got to relive nostalgia ... Replayed this game after 16 years of being pissed off at myself with this game. Was pretty short in today's standards but got to relive nostalgia and finally beat this game!
persona: This customer prioritizes game condition and functionality, values included content and convenience like pre-downloaded titles, and is willing to purchase based on a combination of good condition, affordability, and enjoyable gameplay, while being sensitive to issues like poor storylines or inconsistent controls that affect overall satisfaction.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Game box was in almost perfect condition, both discs were clean with no visible ... Game box was in almost perfect condition, both discs were clean with no visible scratches, the game manual was present and also in good shape. The game worked great and had no problems.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Fun! This is simply a FUN game. It's entertaining, I find the sound effects to be hilarious, and it keeps you interested in completing each level at 100%. Quality addition to any 3DS collection. Review 2: rating 2.0. Pin doesn't work The pin that include in here have been used, i even bought the new Yoshi island and its new one Review 3: rating 5.0. Five Stars Similar story to the origional game with better graphics. Review 4: rating 5.0. A Nice Trip Down Memory Lane I was so excited when I found out that Yoshi's New Island was coming out for the 3DS. Having had owned and loved the original Yoshi's Island, I felt like I had been waiting an eternity for the newest addition to the series. When I got the game and put it in, I was pleasantly surprised that for the most part, not much has changed! I say this in the lines of game-play and graphically, this game is a perfect continuation of the original SNES title. The c... Review 5: rating 5.0. A great addition to the Mario family! A cool addition to the Mario games, my granddaughter loves it! She's almost nine years old and we have a great time playing together! Review 6: rating 3.0. Okay Okay, I have fun with it.
The 2 player is a joke though, so don't get it on that point. Review 7: rating 5.0. Five Stars Prompt shipping. Exactly as described,thanks. Review 8: rating 5.0. Five Stars Great game, kids and adults loved it! Review 9: rating 5.0. Cute!!! Love this game! It's cute and fun to play :) Review 10: rating 5.0. Pretty Easy Unless you aren't a good gamer, which *waves* So I am enjoying it and find parts of it challenging, though my 8-yr old nephew beat it in a few days :-( Anyway, I like the game a lot and am so glad to have another Yoshi Island! Review 11: rating 5.0. Addicting. Just as good (if not better) than the original N64 games. Review 12: rating 5.0. gift for my daughter I bought this for a gift for my nine year old daughter. She loves it and plays it a lot. I9t is a very fun game. Review 13: rating 5.0. My little grandson love it What can I say; my grandson asked for it, I bought it and he love it...nothing else to say. Will see what he ask for next..lol. Review 14: rating 5.0. In love Love this game!!! I can't get enough of this game. I love yoshi and this game has very nice game play and graphics. Review 15: rating 5.0. Five Stars amazing! it s my favourite! Review 16: rating 5.0. Anyone who loved the original GameBoy Yoshi's Island will like this game Anyone who loved the original GameBoy Yoshi's Island will like this game. Of course it doesn't beat the original but it does it justice. Its a bit easier than the original, just to warn those who are looking for a challenge. I usually struggle with the water levels but this one was easy peasy for me. Review 17: rating 5.0. and thanked me - so I guess it was good! Kids requested it, played it, and thanked me - so I guess it was good! Review 18: rating 5.0. Five Stars Played the game it was incredible Review 19: rating 5.0. Great Game This was a gift and was told the game is a lot of fun. Plays like all the other Mario Brothers games. Review 20: rating 5.0. Yoshi's New Island This is a great game for the 3ds. Yoshi's New Island brings back memories but it is a solid new game that everyone can enjoy. The graphics are great and the 3d effect is wonderful. This game will not disappoint.
persona: This customer values nostalgic appeal and gameplay quality, often comparing new releases to classic titles, and is willing to pay a premium for a game that delivers a familiar, well-crafted experience, but may recommend older, more affordable entries to newcomers seeking an accessible entry point.
reference_output: rating 5.0. This is one of my all-time favorite games, and is a good game for anyone This is one of my all-time favorite games, and is a good game for anyone! Whether they're just starting to play or have been playing forever.

Review 1: rating 2.0. The only problem that i had is that the headset ... The only problem that i had is that the headset was not in the original box so it was quite dirty Review 2: rating 4.0. Great BUT not fully win 7 compatible This head set is one of the best i have ever used. the surround sound is perfect with no issues (now), the comfort is amazing not chaffing or ear pain. they have a very good user interface for the program that comes with the drivers, i would definatly suggest these to all my friends and have been. I mainly use these for music and world of warcraft and they work wonderfully. my only complaint is that they are not fully windows 7 compatable and the ... Review 3: rating 5.0. Battlefield 3 gaming .. with G35 I bought these Logitech earphones back in 2011 when BF3 (battlefield 3) came out.
I have used these for hours and hours during the last year playing this game.
G35 have saved me from enemy knife 100s of times ..
You can hear so clear and so realistically, that playing hard core with no spotting or map is easy.
You hear enemy foot steps, Vehicles and aircraft positioning very correctly
I love this product.

last month... Review 4: rating 1.0. DO NOT BUY THIS ITEM This piece of trash did not work at all. The Logitech Gaming Software never once detected the headset, whether the drivers were working or not which they almost never did. Even attempting to download the new software for this specifc device didnt do anthing. Buyer Beware: this item is trash Review 5: rating 2.0. Uncomfortable These are very uncomfortable I generally have to take these off after 20 minutes mainly due to the weight as these are by far the heaviest headphones I have ever seen. Prior to buying these I would wear my Sennheiser's for hours at a time with no problems. Review 6: rating 1.0. Do not buy....... Padding fell apart after two years - wiring looks like it is about to break - poorly made construction - not worth the cost. Review 7: rating 5.0. Looks and feels wonderful, music and games sound great, very comfortable with glasses and extended use. (Two year update, broke) Fantastic headset, looks and feels awesome. Braid cable does not make any noise when rubbing against fabric. Does not hurt with glasses until about four hours of continuous wear, but generally not an issue. Fits my very large head, and the other side can hear me clearly. Would recommend, very good headset.

Head... Review 8: rating 5.0. Good Headset Pro:
Very comfortable headphones that fully cover the ears witch blocks out sound rather well.
Sound quality is excellent and the virtual 7.1 works with most programs and sounds amazing.
Side buttons and volume control are really handy, and mic mute light on the microphone boom is a nice feature.
Long tangle free cable

Con:
little bit heavy Review 9: rating 1.0. Do you like Cracks? I purchased this on cyber Monday and was pleased with it for a while but only three months later I'm left with a sour taste in my mouth. I'm very disappointed with the quality of the material. The sound is still great still but the plastic casing has already started to crack and break. You get what you pay for. Review 10: rating 5.0. Bit pricey, but lovely sound As the title says - I'm actually very impressed with the stereo sound from these headphones. Listening to my music has in some cases been like rediscovering tracks entirely! It might be possible to get a similar sound quality cheaper elsewhere, but these ones game damn nice too. Good combo, overall. Review 11: rating 1.0. Save your money. The sound is exceptional. However the drivers/software keep resetting with various games on origin. These are bulky and uncomfortable, the complete covering of outside sounds is problematic when life happens. And to add insult to injury, one of the ear pieces broke off after a couple of months.
I have had other breakage problems from Logitech, but the price point of those products was forgiveable and they lasted somewhat longer. Review 12: rating 5.0. Everything I was hoping it would be. I rated this according to everything that I was looking for in a headset.

I tried to use the Plantronics 780 and struggled with getting the drivers to work. In the end I sent them back and got this one instead.

Compatibility:
Seeing as that was my primary issue with the other USB headset, I was especially worried about this one.

Well this worked great with my vista 64-bit. All the features work regardless of... Review 13: rating 2.0. No directional sound at all. And unconfortable. But surround is good. I am a gamer, bought this for games, and I was using a Senheiser headset, which has great sound, but wasn't surround neither had mic.

First and most important. The directional sound feature just does not work. At all. The front and rear channels sound pretty much the same as the left/right channels. There is NO DIRECTIONAL audio at all. In Battlefield 3, you just can't identify the direction of events ju... Review 14: rating 2.0. Two Stars not suitable for all ages Review 15: rating 2.0. My head ! Why !!? I felt like my head would explode from all the pressure these suckers put out. I have a fairly small head size. I also had read some reviews that claimed they were tight before buying it, and I thought to myself, naah my head is very small, can't happen to me. Surprise, surprise they really hurt after an hour of play. The mac compatibility is pretty weak, no surround sound or any adjustments, I hear that the mic has some problems as well, but I haven't tested myself... Review 16: rating 1.0. it was amazing until I dropped just one time and the left ... Used this headset for about three months, it was amazing until I dropped just one time and the left ear piece fell off. Review 17: rating 4.0. Overwhelming Sound I first bought the G35 headset because of reviews that had said it gave the speaker a clear voice on recordings, and since my main reason for purchasing this was to record Youtube videos, I gave the G35 headset a try. And even after a short time, headset already goes above and beyond what I would expect of it.

First off though, I would like to point out a few minor details that, if altered, would have made me give this product 5 stars instead of 4. In th... Review 18: rating 5.0. Love it but it is fragile Received as a gift.

Pros:

It has great sound/audio and is aesthetically pleasing.

It is very comfortable to wear. I could wear it all day! It comes with two extra head paddings to switch out with. I had the SteelSeries Siberia V2 headset for a little bit but the earmuffs were too small. G35's ear muffs are the perfect size for me. The padding is fluffy and soft.

The mute button and volume slider on the side is very... Review 19: rating 1.0. I have owned FOUR of these never again. I have owned four of these headsets since 2011. 3 out of 4 have had some sort of problem. I have never processed an RMA because as a gamer I could not be parted with use of audio for 10+ days. This recent issue I have had happened 4 months after purchase. My headset will NOT work with VOIP applications like Ventrillo,Teamspeak,Skype and any game. One of three things happens if I try and open a game with a voip program open and that is A. Game a... Review 20: rating 4.0. Just fine. This is the first digital surround sound headphones I have bought.

I was expecting more... The lows occasionally turn into just noise, after 30 minutes to an hour my ears start to get uncomfortable, and they don't really feel that sturdy.

With that in mind, I very much like these headphones. The microphone is very good, way better than my old one. The sound quality is for the most part excellent.

I don't think I would recommend these to ...
persona: This customer prioritizes functional performance and ease of setup, especially compatibility with Windows 10 and plug-and-play operation, while being willing to overlook minor design flaws if core features like mic and sound quality meet expectations.
reference_output: rating 2.0. You Prob shouldn't buy this, a heads up. I've been using and going through headphones here and there every so often. I bought this one recently after every brand of Sades i ever bought has died to the same problem of bad wiring. I gave up on the brand and decided to go to something new. A few weeks in id have to say, they work great mic quality is good, sound quality is good, , however there is one major problem. Every time i use the microphone in a Discord or Skype call, the headset starts making a spinning sound. It sounds exactly the same as a computer processing fan, albeit a bit quieter, but directly in my ear. If it wasn't for this these headsets would be flippin fantastic  (Buzzing doesn't happen if just listening to audio) . I dunno if i got a unlucky pair, but i feel if i continue to hear this buzzing in my ear i'm gonna toss them out of the window. Maybe with some luck it'll break soon like the other people i didn't listen to in their reviews. Oh yeah in some angles this headset it actually really uncomfy idk why, in some angles it feels perfectly fine.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. REALLY NEAT GAME!!! MY 6 YEAR OLD SON LOVES IT!! ALOT LIKE MARIO PARTY 8!!! FUN! FUN! FUN! Our family really loves Mario Party 8, of course nothing compares to it. Mario is the bomb!!! But this game is really neat and plays much like Mario party 8 (at least we think so). It's alot like a board game. I will admit in the beginning I was a little confused, but once you give it a chance and play a few different boards and spend some time getting to know the game, you realize how muc... Review 2: rating 4.0. Fun for the Gaming Challenged! If you're not a gamer, you'll probably like this. The graphics are cute but not high quality. The dialog leaves a bit to be desired and the sound effects and music are very repetitive.

It's a board-game style with lots of mini-games worked into it. Great for kids and fun for adults that are willing to try something different. Very simple rules = no confused frustrated googling for answers.

I haven't run into any bugs that actua... Review 3: rating 5.0. pac-man party I bought this for a gift. The family loves it. great for all ages with help. I bought it for a 38 year old male and all of the kids love it. Ages from 3 to 13! A great family game classic. Review 4: rating 5.0. Love it I grew up playing Pac Man and I absolutely love this game. It is a little hard for my 4 year old granddaughter but she will get better at it the more she plays. As for myself, I love it and would recommend this game to anyone who grew up playing and loving pac man. Review 5: rating 5.0. And a skip button to skip thru the instructions if you already know how to play it. Other than that...this game is a lot of fun. Review 7: rating 5.0. But, he has been on such a Pacman kick lately. He loves this game and has mastered many of the mini games. As a family, we have played countless hours with him on it. Lots of fun for the family. Ages 4 to 104 will love it! Review 8: rating 5.0. Fun for all ages! The is our favorite family game, hands-down.
There are so many levels of competition, everyone can 'win' some of the battles. The mini games are quite creative and funny. We prefer these games to Carnival Games (which was more expensive).
We play with a 5 year old, young adults, adults, and even a toddler gets in at gives the buttons a try.

I was a fan of the original Pac Man, but wasn't impressed with this newer version. However, my grandson seems to like it just fine. Review 11: rating 4.0. LOVE PacMan My 5 year old & I LOVE this game! So fun!!! It's a bit long, but totally entertaining!! I just cannot figure out how to play the old fashioned pac man game on it. All I get is a "GAME OVER' message on my screen?!! Put I got it for a great price & we LOVE it! Review 12: rating 5.0. PACMAN My ten year old daughter just love this game. There are alot of different games you can play on this dvd, but my favorite will have to be pac-man being chase by the ghosts. Review 13: rating 5.0. Pac-Man + Multi-Player Game = Family Fun I purchased this game (from my son) for my husband for Father's Day. We love it. The new game is a lot of fun play. You go to different places, try to get castles and collect cookies. If you land on a free spot - free castle. If two players land on the same spot and no castle is there yet - you get to pick a present to see who gets that castle. However, if you land on a space that has someone else's castle - LET THE BATTLE BEGIN!!! The battles... Review 14: rating 5.0. 13 year old loves it!! My 13 year old loves this game. reference_output:
rating 5.0. Great Addition to the Pac-Man Franchise I've played a few dogs over the years with Pac-Man attached to it (what was the name of the game with the slingshot?), and I've been blown away by others (Championship Edition DX for XBOX is still addictive). This game is a perfect addition, especially for someone like me who is introducing my kid and my nieces and nephews to video gaming.

The game plays similar to Mario Party and like games, but there's unique ways to "roll the dice" to advance around the board. At first I didn't get the concept of "building castles" but after a few turns it begins to make sense. While the adventure and board games are fun, the real fun is the ability to battle in the mini-games without having to unlock them. Plus, it doesn't hurt that the original Galaga, Dig-Dug, and Pac-Man are all packed into this game. There's also much controller variety, from aiming and shooting to actually controlling characters with the d-pad.

For an old school gamer with a 4-year-old son, I would definitely recommend this game, not only for the young gamers but for adults as well
(and FYI, I picked this up for $15 for Christmas, which I think made this a win-win).

rating 3.0. I HATE ORIGIN I love the Sims, and I play with this game since a long time now. My previous computer got stolen, so since some years, I haven't played it anymore because I lost the discs and all my families with it and I was not that excited with the idea of starting from zero.
Anyway, I decided now to buy it again, and everything went smoothly with the shipping, and the product itself; but when the moment of installing arrived it was a very big headache.
I'm no computer savvy, but I'm not an ignorant, and even though the new process with Origin gave me tons of error messages and problems, I do miss the old days when you could just install the game from the Wizard. But now Origin won't let you do it any other way. At the end, I spent like 40 minutes configuring everything about the program and my computer to make it work, but it was a huge waste of my time.
The game is fine, I'll try it to see how it goes.

reference_output: rating 5.0. Xbox one did not disappoint This is an excellent buy. I was debating getting the PS4 but I stuck with Microsoft because I liked the 360. I got it today and played it for a good 4 hours. Mine had no problems like some of the problems that have been reported. I set it up in about 15 minutes and then had to wait another 20 because of updates. The audio and video picture is a lot better. Going in and out of gameplay and the dashboard takes 1 sec tops, which is a big improvement from the 360. You can just just click the game icon and it loads right where you left off. The new controller is awesome, the feel of it is much smoother with the gameplay.  The kinect works way better than expected, this new version is a major improvement to the last one. The commands you can tell the kinect work like a charm. It also works way better inside the gameplay. Kinda weird to say xbox on and the thing turns on but who's complaining? The xbox one did not disappoint me.

reference_output:
rating 3.0. Good but not great. Inaccurate advertising. May contain -Spoilers-
There are a ton of trailers, previews, sneak peaks, and gameplay that did not make it into the game or aren't in the game. With that said this is a decent game depending on what you want. That's the most important part. What type of game do you want? If you want a good Final Fantasy game or are a Final Fantasy fan you will not love this game. If you want a game with a lot of things to do, has good graphics, and a decent fighting system then you'll most likely enjoy this game. I can go on for a while but I'll keep it simple.

Pros:
- A good battle system that works for the most part.
- Good graphics.
- Good music.
- The food looks good and makes you hungry.

Cons:
- Horrible camera system that often times kill the great battle system.
- A lot of bugs and glitches (even with the patch) that will kill some of your progress, waste your time, or forces you to restart or reload.
- Very short. The actual game is less than 20hrs long.
- Little or no story. The game is only about seven chapters. The rest is mainly there for you to explore the world.
- No character development, explanations, lore, backstory, or buildup. Things kind of just 'happen' as you go along.
- The skill and magic usage is very watered down and simplified.
- Pacing is one of the worst in any game. Most chapters or scenes feel either dragged out or cut too short. Not a good balance.
- Not a lot of good replay value. The saying, "Seen one, seen them all" shines very true here.
- Game is too easy.

persona: This customer values functional design and intuitive software but is highly sensitive to poor software performance, limited customization (especially for macros), and unnecessary bloatware; they prioritize reliable, well-integrated peripherals with meaningful features over low price alone and are likely to avoid brands with subpar software ecosystems.
reference_output: rating 2.0. Inconsistent The mouse has a good feeling in the hand with texture and side grips. Software is not bloated. Software is intuitive for the most part and easy to setup. Software can be buggy sometimes when trying to launch the application but a simple fix for me was to end the services related to the app and re launch. Discord integration is a nice feature but could be improved upon with more option for specific notifications and a setting for longer display of said notifications. Also display is to narrow and at an angle for you to read. Notifications don’t seem to fully display only the beginning part of a message. The weight of the mouse is a turn off. I purchased this with the intent of capitalizing on the features but I was hugely disappointed. Tactical feedback is weak on highest setting making the build feel cheap especially considering the weight of this mouse. The on board memory is somewhat bugged. For example if I set button 4 to mouse button 1 and toggle repeat my clicks won’t register on button 1 or button 4 so I have to open the software reconfigure the settings. It might work for sometime but then the issue happens again and when I start the software it shows some my bindings have changed even though I have all of my profiles duplicated on board. So on board memory and software integration is a inconsistent at best. For example toggle hold works fine for me but repeat on hold does nothing. At this price point I was willing to compromise for a heavy mouse if the feature were worth the price but unfortunately they are not.

Review 1: rating 5.0. Trying not to compare too much to 3 First off, this game is absolutely awesome and I just got it yesterday and have only played about 2-3 hours worth.

This is a turn-based rpg with wondeful little animated monsters, whose animations change when they get close to death. The game will punish you on normal mode for not grinding and levelling up. persona: This customer prioritizes product reliability, performance, and safety, especially for gaming hardware and accessories, and is willing to pay for high-quality, well-designed items that prevent damage and deliver consistent functionality, while being highly sensitive to defects, poor build quality, and technical flaws that compromise usability or safety.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Solution to issues with the Switch dock I have a Nintendo Switch that I use alot. I am very gentle with it. I got a screen protector, but noticed scratches on my system. The dock is the culprit. The switch dock overheats and scratches the console. One time I was playing Zelda BOTW and it got so hot that the thermal paste expanded and started popping the screen out. I had to do something, so I got this extension cable kit. I have a HORI switch stand that gives the console more than enough breathing room and I plug the extension cable in the dock and just have the switch sit on the stand with a single cable attached. My console has been free from new scratches and no more overheating and screen popping out of the console. The dock is a horrible design and is destroying consoles. This product is a console saver.

It also makes the Switch quite a bit nicer to hold in your hands.
